Workflow: .github/workflows/publish.yml

Secrets and tokens used:

1. NUGET_API_KEY
   Required for: Publish to NuGet.org job
   What it is:   A NuGet.org API key with permission to push packages.
   Where to get: NuGet.org -> account settings -> API Keys -> Create
   Recommended:  Scope the key to MauiRust.Templates only,
                 select "Push new packages and package versions".

2. GITHUB_TOKEN
   Required for: Publish to GitHub Packages job
   What it is:   The built-in Actions token provided automatically to every run.
   Where to get: No setup needed -- it is always available as secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN.
   Note:         The job grants packages:write permission so the token can push
                 to GitHub Packages for this repository.
